# Test Fixtures

This directory contains binary program files used for SDK testing.

## Files

- `valid_program.bin` - Valid A2S compiled program (placeholder)
- `program1.bin` - Test program 1 (placeholder)
- `program2.bin` - Test program 2 (placeholder)
- `simple_loop.bin` - Simple loop program (placeholder)
- `infinite_loop.bin` - Infinite loop program (placeholder)
- `simple_program.bin` - Simple program (placeholder)
- `multi_tile.bin` - Multi-tile program (placeholder)
- `memory_write.bin` - Memory write test program (placeholder)

Note: These are placeholder files. Real A2S compiled binaries should replace these
when the compiler is available.
